items.name: Rewind Fruit
items.description: A spiral-skinned cursed fruit that tastes like last Tuesday.
items.effect: Retry a failed boss timer without losing your streak.

items.name: Oracle Fruit
items.description: Its seeds whisper. Eat one and the fog thins for a moment.
items.effect: Reveal the hidden pattern hint of one problem (once).

items.name: Haste Fruit
items.description: Crackles with storm-light. Your hands move before your thoughts.
items.effect: Double XP from every solve for 24 hours.

items.name: Streak Freeze
items.description: A shard of never-melting ice from the Frozen Latitudes.
items.effect: Protects your streak for one missed day (used automatically).

items.name: Jolly Algorithm Flag
items.description: A flag stitched with a skull wearing reading glasses.
items.effect: Cosmetic bragging rights on your bounty poster shelf.

items.name: Wayfinder Lantern
items.description: Burns brighter the closer you sail to The One Solution.
items.effect: Cosmetic bragging rights on your bounty poster shelf.

items.name: Stormcloth Sail
items.description: Woven from squall-silk. Catches even the laziest wind.
items.effect: A ship part for your growing vessel.

items.name: Debugger Cannon
items.description: Fires concentrated print statements at approaching bugs.
items.effect: A ship part for your growing vessel.

items.name: Turtle-and-Hare Figurehead
items.description: Two carved racers forever chasing each other around the prow.
items.effect: A ship part for your growing vessel.
